arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the transit gateway multicast domain.

associations.description: A list of associations for the transit gateway multicast domain, including subnet IDs and transit gateway attachment IDs.

auto_accept_shared_associations.description: Indicates whether the domain automatically accepts shared associations.

id.description: The ID of the transit gateway multicast domain.

igmpv2_support.description: Indicates whether Internet Group Management Protocol version 2 (IGMPv2) is supported.

members.description: A list of members in the multicast domain, each with a group IP address and network interface ID.

owner_id.description: The ID of the AWS account that owns the transit gateway multicast domain.

sources.description: A list of source configurations for the multicast domain, each with a group IP address and network interface ID.

state.description: The current state of the transit gateway multicast domain.

static_sources_support.description: Indicates whether static sources are supported in the multicast domain.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the transit gateway multicast domain.

transit_gateway_attachment_id.description: The ID of the transit gateway attachment associated with the multicast domain.

transit_gateway_id.description: The ID of the transit gateway associated with the multicast domain.

transit_gateway_multicast_domain_id.description: The ID of the transit gateway multicast domain.
